security_rules: Gemini API Keys must be sent via Headers, NEVER URLs
Database must be encrypted with SQLCipher
Backend must have rate limiting (10 req/min)
Backend CORS must be restricted to trusted origins
Error messages must be sanitized for production

patterns: Key Rotation Strategy for Gemini API
gotchas: Wait for network sync when using multi-process terminal commands
Railway credits: Bandwidth is expensive, cleaning transcripts on server saves money
Avoid non-existent models (Gemini 2.5/3) in rotation loops to reduce latency
Move prompt building outside of API rotation loops to save CPU
